title: Work with Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander ceremonial and sacred materials
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Work with Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander ceremonial and sacred materials demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Conduct background research and consultation with Traditional Owners, Community, Cultural Authorities/Knowledge Holders

pcs.text: Confirm traditional ownership of cultural material and objects, and consult appropriate Traditional Owners or Cultural Authorities and Communities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm traditional ownership of cultural material and objects, and consult appropriate Traditional Owners or Cultural Authorities and Communities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm traditional ownership of cultural material and objects, and consult appropriate Traditional Owners or Cultural Authorities and Communities.

pcs.text: Identify gender requirements for consultations, handling of and access to materials according to cultural protocols
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify gender requirements for consultations, handling of and access to materials according to cultural protocols?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify gender requirements for consultations, handling of and access to materials according to cultural protocols.

pcs.text: Consult with Traditional Owner/s, Community groups and experts to determine suitable holding for materials not authorised for general exhibition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with Traditional Owner/s, Community groups and experts to determine suitable holding for materials not authorised for general exhibition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with Traditional Owner/s, Community groups and experts to determine suitable holding for materials not authorised for general exhibition.

pcs.text: Obtain permissions from appropriate Cultural Authorities for access to and use of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander sacred and ceremonial materials
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain permissions from appropriate Cultural Authorities for access to and use of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander sacred and ceremonial materials?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain permissions from appropriate Cultural Authorities for access to and use of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander sacred and ceremonial materials.

pcs.text: Consult with local Community to determine culturally appropriate handling of material and any limitations on access to materials
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with local Community to determine culturally appropriate handling of material and any limitations on access to materials?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with local Community to determine culturally appropriate handling of material and any limitations on access to materials.

pcs.text: Demonstrate confidentiality and neutrality in consultations and dealings with Traditional Owners and Cultural Authorities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Demonstrate confidentiality and neutrality in consultations and dealings with Traditional Owners and Cultural Authorities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Demonstrate confidentiality and neutrality in consultations and dealings with Traditional Owners and Cultural Authorities.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Conduct background research and consultation with Traditional Owners, Community, Cultural Authorities/Knowledge Holders

elements.title: Handle Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander ceremonial and sacred material

pcs.text: Allow for and support the carrying out of any required Ceremony and procedure associated with seeing, handling or moving the material
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Allow for and support the carrying out of any required Ceremony and procedure associated with seeing, handling or moving the material?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Allow for and support the carrying out of any required Ceremony and procedure associated with seeing, handling or moving the material.

pcs.text: Note aspects of cultural material requiring repair or attention, and pass onto supervisor or person with relevant expertise
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Note aspects of cultural material requiring repair or attention, and pass onto supervisor or person with relevant expertise?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Note aspects of cultural material requiring repair or attention, and pass onto supervisor or person with relevant expertise.

pcs.text: Communicate specific Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural requirements to colleagues
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate specific Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural requirements to colleagues?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate specific Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural requirements to colleagues.

pcs.text: Select and use appropriate handling and moving equipment according to safe work practices and to protect sacred and ceremonial material
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and use appropriate handling and moving equipment according to safe work practices and to protect sacred and ceremonial material?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and use appropriate handling and moving equipment according to safe work practices and to protect sacred and ceremonial material.

pcs.text: Adhere to cultural restrictions and limitations on sacred and ceremonial material
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adhere to cultural restrictions and limitations on sacred and ceremonial material?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adhere to cultural restrictions and limitations on sacred and ceremonial material.

pcs.text: Demonstrate handling of cultural material in a manner that protects individual items, assists efficient loading and unloading processes if moving, and in accordance with safe work practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Demonstrate handling of cultural material in a manner that protects individual items, assists efficient loading and unloading processes if moving, and in accordance with safe work practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Demonstrate handling of cultural material in a manner that protects individual items, assists efficient loading and unloading processes if moving, and in accordance with safe work practices.

pcs.text: Handle, move, store and manage ceremonial and sacred cultural material in accordance with Burra Charter guidelines and legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle, move, store and manage ceremonial and sacred cultural material in accordance with Burra Charter guidelines and legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle, move, store and manage ceremonial and sacred cultural material in accordance with Burra Charter guidelines and legislative requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Handle Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander ceremonial and sacred material

elements.title: Contribute to documenting a generational succession plan for passing on ownership of sacred material

pcs.text: Discuss options for inheritance of ownership with Traditional Owners and/or Elders

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss options for inheritance of ownership with Traditional Owners and/or Elders.

pcs.text: Comply with the requirements of Indigenous Cultural and Intellectual Property principles
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Comply with the requirements of Indigenous Cultural and Intellectual Property principles?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Comply with the requirements of Indigenous Cultural and Intellectual Property principles.

pcs.text: Participate in documenting the process, guidelines and timeframes agreeable to Traditional Owners and Cultural Authorities for handover of ownership, control and access to sacred materials
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Participate in documenting the process, guidelines and timeframes agreeable to Traditional Owners and Cultural Authorities for handover of ownership, control and access to sacred materials?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Participate in documenting the process, guidelines and timeframes agreeable to Traditional Owners and Cultural Authorities for handover of ownership, control and access to sacred materials.

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
